meaning: n.小鲱鱼,海中微生物,n. 英国人
examples: Worse, he wasn't even a Brit.
She performed at the Brit Awards last week minus her wedding ring.
The BRIT awards are the British Phonographic Industry's annual pop music awards.
Opening Friday, "The East" is directed by Zal Batmanglij, who co-wrote the script with Brit Marling.
Brit reportedly collapsed shortly after midnight from partying or exhaustion, foreshadowing the rest of her year.
